text:
There once was a small creature named Hoppy that lived in a whimsical meadow full of flowers from every color imaginable. Hoppy loved playing all day long, hopping from flower bed to flower bed, singing melodies that made the flowers dance.

One sunny afternoon, Hoppy noticed something strange on a nearby leaf. There were tiny, shiny black seeds scattered around. Hoppy was fascinated! Each seed glittered gently in the sun.

Curious, Hoppy spread out the seeds on the soft patch of earth. They grew into tiny saplings overnight. After a few more days, the saplings blossomed into gorgeous black tulips that shone like tiny stars.

Hoppy couldn't help but sing about the magic of nature. The tulips made cheerful music that filled the air, making the meadow alive with enchantment. Other creatures in the meadow gathered around to listen to Hoppy's tales.
